title: amblovenatum tildeniae
side_effects: Amblovenatum tildeniae can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high levels of toxic compounds. In rare cases, prolonged consumption can lead to kidney damage, respiratory problems, and even cardiac arrest. Some users have reported skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive issues, including diarrhea and stomach ulcers, after ingesting or applying the plant in excessive amounts. Improper use of amblovenatum tildeniae can also cause hormonal imbalances, leading to issues such as thyroid problems and irregular menstrual cycles.
